summary: Chlorhexidine is recommended over Metronidazole for treating bacterial vaginosis in pregnant women based on lower risk of adverse fetal outcomes and comparable effectiveness while offering reduced potential side-effects. Approximately 30% of BV cases may improve naturally requiring no specific interventions. 葡萄球菌性阴道炎在孕妇中应优选葡萄糖酸氯已定进行治疗，基于它比甲硝唑具有更低的风险、相媲美的疗效且潜在不良反应较少的优势；另外大约30% 的病例可能自然好转不需要特殊处理。
